zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh於1170年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，他的父親Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh21歲，母親Mary Sandilands15歲。他於1202年之前與Beatrice Learmouth在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1240年在英國蘇格蘭登迪享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh于1170年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，他的父亲Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh21岁，母亲Mary Sandilands15岁。他于1202年之前与Beatrice Learmouth在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1240年在英国苏格兰登迪享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh was born in 1170, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh, was 21 and his mother, Mary Sandilands, was 15. He married Beatrice Learmouth before 1202, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1240, in Dundee, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh est né en 1170, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Sandilands, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Learmouth avant 1202, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1240, à Dundee, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh 1170 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh 21 und seine Mutter Mary Sandilands 15. Er hat vor 1202 in Scotland Beatrice Learmouth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1240 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Dundee, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh è nato il nel 1170 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mary Sandilands, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Learmouth prima del 1202, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1240, nel Dundee, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintoshが1170年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintoshは21歳，母Mary Sandilandsは15歳であった。1202年以前にスコットランドでBeatrice Learmouthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1240年にイギリススコットランドダンディーで70歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh(이)가 1170년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Sandilands(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1202년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Beatrice Learmouth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1240년 영국 스코틀랜드 던디에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh nasceu em 1170, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mary Sandilands, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Learmouth antes 1202, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1240, em Dundee, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh родился в 1170 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Sandilands, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Learmouth перед 1202 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1240 г. в местности дунди, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh nació en 1170, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mary Sandilands, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Beatrice Learmouth antes de 1202, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1240, en Dundee, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
